result: Aider 0.86.2 ran in the dedicated Runner but without a provider credential waited for interactive login until the 15-second verifier budget expired. Definition version 2 now requires one of OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before planning. Browser and authenticated PlanResource checks blocked the same no-credential draft without creating a plan or resource.
next: bind a non-production EnvironmentBundle that supplies one supported provider key, then create the Worker and require a completed browser reply
